name: Tap Score Advanced City Water Test
bestFor: Readers who want one thorough lab-backed answer after a notice, repeated water-quality concern, or post-replacement comparison.
whyItFits: This is the stronger recommendation when the reader clearly wants a full baseline instead of piecemeal testing and would act differently if a wider set of contaminants appears.
watchout: It costs more than the narrow kits, so it is overkill unless the reader will actually use the broader result set to decide on treatment, follow-up testing, or escalation.
evidenceNote: Tap Score says the Advanced City Water Test covers 111 analytes, including metals, VOCs, and disinfection byproducts, with step-by-step sampling instructions.
